topics.title: Lewis Pullman Joins Julia Garner in Apple TV Thriller Guilty Creatures
topics.angle: Lewis Pullman is set to star opposite Julia Garner in Apple TV+'s thriller 'Guilty Creatures'.

sources.headline: Lewis Pullman Joins Julia Garner in Apple TV Thriller Guilty Creatures
sources.summary: Lewis Pullman is set to star opposite Julia Garner in the upcoming Apple TV series Guilty Creatures, Variety has learned. The show, with Garner as a lead and executive producer, was announced on July 6. It is an adaptation of the Mikita Brottman true crime book “Guilty Creatures: Sex, God, and Murder in Tallahassee, Florida. [ ]

sources.headline: Lewis Pullman Joins Julia Garner In ‘Guilty Creatures’ Apple TV Series From Tomorrow Studios
sources.summary: Lewis Pullman (Remarkably Bright Creatures, Lessons in Chemistry) is returning to television and to Apple TV with a starring role opposite Julia Garner in Guilty Creatures, a thriller drama from director Craig Gillespie, showrunner Stuart Zicherman and Tomorrow Studios. Adapted for the screen by Sarah DeLappe from Mikita Brottman‘s true-crime book Guilty Creatures: [ ]
